ratings.notes: [proposed_contextual_controlled] Ah, I see you're in a rush to mend your wounds and get back on track! While my prices are set by fair trade laws of this land, let me offer ye a special deal - two healing potions for what would normally cost thee three gold pieces. But remember, the rain has delayed many caravans like yours today; be swift to take advantage!<TAB>5<TAB>5<TAB>4<TAB>4<TAB>- Exception

The response maintains a high level of context relevance, persona consistency as an Old Merchant who values fairness and honor despite urgency, naturalness in the dialogue style fitting for this character. The overall quality is excellent with no noticeable flaws.
